sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: India's declining household savings amid reduced FDI is big concern: Report - ETCFO
feed.summary: India's savings rate is not as robust as needed due to declining household financial savings and increasing financial liabilities, especially unsecured personal loans. Household savings have dropped significantly from 84% of total savings in 2000 to 61% in 2023.
